fields.helpText: Title of the clinical quality measure.
Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services clinical quality measure ID.
Version number of the clinical quality measure.
Globally Unique Identifier of the clinical quality measure.
National Quality Forum identifier of the clinical quality measure.
This word-processing field contains the description of the clinical quality measure.
Category the clinical quality measure is in; examples are: Attribute, Communication, Individual Characteristic, Medication, and Procedure.
The numerical portion of the CMS ID, for example if the CMS ID is CMS71v4 then Identifier is 71.
Status of the clinical quality measure, for example: InProgress or Complete.
Clinical quality measure type, examples are: OUTCOME or PROCESS.
This is the Measure Set the measure belongs to. Measure Sets are defined by a combination of year, either calendar or fiscal, and eligible hospital (EH) or eligible provider (EP). Example: CY 2014 EP
A spreadsheet is one of the formats in which clinical quality measures can be obtained. Sheetname is the name of the spreadsheet sheet where the clinical quality measure is located.
Organization that developed the clinical quality measure.
Organization that is the steward of the clinical quality measure. It may or may not be the same as the developer of the measure.
This word-processing field describes any copyrights associated with the clinical quality measure. It can include things like copyrights for coding systems used by the measure and the measure itself.
This multiple contains a list of all the value sets used by the clinical quality measure.
